main.description: Send a notification to a recipient who has granted the sender permission. Sender-authenticated.

uri.description: Optional link opened when the notification is tapped.

threadKey.description: Optional opaque key for grouping related notifications.

category.description: Optional free-form category (e.g. 'mention', 'reply') used for per-category routing.

categoryDescription.description: Optional human description of the category, shown in the routing UI.

actors.description: Optional handles/DIDs of the people behind this notification (for avatar stacks).

delivered.description: Number of channels the notification was dispatched to.
